title: 🧹 Refactor concurrent.futures import in run_merges.py
description:
* 🎯 What: Refactored `import concurrent.futures` to `from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor` in `run_merges.py`.
* 💡 Why: Static analysis showed the `concurrent.futures` module as unused, which was a false positive since it was used as `concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor`. Importing `ThreadPoolExecutor` directly resolves the static analysis flag while maintaining exact functionality and improving readability.
* ✅ Verification: Ran `make test-all` and verified that the code runs without `NameError` exceptions.
* ✨ Result: Resolved a false positive dead code warning and slightly improved readability.
